metaDescription: Practical guides on Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO and digital transformation for businesses in Morocco.
title: <highlight>Practical</highlight> guides
description: In-depth guides to master marketing, web and digital growth.

meta-ads-centre-formation.title: Complete Meta Ads guide for businesses in Morocco
meta-ads-centre-formation.description: From strategy to scaling: audiences, creatives, budget and optimization for all industries.
steps: Define the offer and buyer persona
Structure the ad account by offer
mistakes: Stopping campaigns before 14 days of learning

faqs.question: What Meta budget to start with?
faqs.answer: 8,000 MAD/month minimum to test one offer in one geographic area.

faqs.question: How many creatives to test?
faqs.answer: At least 3-5 variants per offer in continuous A/B testing.

google-ads-centre-formation.title: Google Ads guide for businesses in Morocco
google-ads-centre-formation.description: Search, Performance Max and landing pages for high-intent searches.
steps: Create a Search campaign per training program

faqs.question: Search or PMax first?
faqs.answer: Search for control, PMax to scale once conversions are tracked.

faqs.question: What Quality Score to aim for?
faqs.answer: 7+ on your main keywords through ad-page relevance.

seo-entreprise-maroc.title: SEO guide for businesses in Morocco
seo-entreprise-maroc.description: Technical audit, content, link building and local SEO to rank on Google.
steps: Audit technical site health (speed, indexing, mobile)
Create optimized pages per service and city

faqs.question: How long for SEO results?
faqs.answer: 3 to 6 months for significant gains depending on competition.

faqs.question: SEO or Google Ads?
faqs.answer: Both: Ads for immediacy, SEO for long term.

agence-digitale-maroc-guide.title: How to choose a digital agency in Morocco
agence-digitale-maroc-guide.description: Criteria, questions to ask and red flags when selecting a 360° partner.
steps: Request case studies in your industry
Start with an audit or pilot project

faqs.question: Agency or freelancer?
faqs.answer: A 360° agency covers more skills with a coordinated team.

faqs.question: Minimum budget?
faqs.answer: From 8,000 MAD/month for active marketing, excluding media.

comment-creer-site-web-professionnel.title: How to create a professional website in Morocco
comment-creer-site-web-professionnel.description: Concrete steps to launch a credible corporate site: scope, content, design, tech and go-live.
steps: Define business goal (leads, sales, awareness) and persona
Structure site map (home, services, proof, contact)
Choose responsive design aligned with your brand
Build on a performant stack (Next.js recommended)
Set up technical SEO, analytics and forms
Test mobile, speed and contact flow before launch
mistakes: Copying a template without conversion strategy
Neglecting mobile speed and basic SEO
Forgetting social proof and clear calls to action

faqs.question: How many pages for a pro site?
faqs.answer: Often 5 to 8 structured pages: home, services, about, work, blog/resources, contact.

faqs.question: WordPress or custom development?
faqs.answer: CMS for a simple site; Next.js/custom when performance, SEO and scalability matter.

combien-coute-site-web-maroc.title: How much does a website cost in Morocco?
combien-coute-site-web-maroc.description: Realistic price ranges by site type, features and level of agency support.
steps: Identify site type (brochure, corporate, e-commerce, platform)
Request a detailed quote (design, dev, SEO, maintenance)
Plan annual maintenance and evolution budget
mistakes: Comparing upfront price only without maintenance
Choosing the cheapest option without technical audit

faqs.question: Budget for a corporate brochure site?
faqs.answer: Typically 6,000 to 35,000 MAD depending on design, content and integrations. See our website creation pricing page.

faqs.question: Is SEO included in the site price?
faqs.answer: Technical SEO foundation yes; ongoing SEO strategy is usually a separate monthly budget.

guide-marketing-digital-maroc.title: Digital marketing guide for Morocco
guide-marketing-digital-maroc.description: Roadmap to structure acquisition, conversion and retention: channels, tools and budget priorities.
steps: Clarify goals and KPIs (leads, revenue, acquisition cost)
Pick priority channels (Meta, Google, SEO, email, WhatsApp)
Set up tracking and CRM to measure every dirham
Create landing pages and content matched to intent
Test, optimize weekly, scale what works
mistakes: Spreading budget across too many channels without data
Sending traffic to a generic homepage

faqs.question: Which channel to start with in Morocco?
faqs.answer: Meta Ads to create demand, Google Ads if your offer is already searched, SEO in parallel for mid-term.

faqs.question: Minimum digital marketing budget?
faqs.answer: From 8,000 MAD/month excl. media for structured execution; media varies by sector and goals.
